title: Rithvik Credits Net Game for Recent Success
indian_angle: Young Indian shuttler Rithvik, who recently won the Valence Alpes International, attributes his improved performance to a stronger net game.
summary: Indian shuttler Rithvik, fresh off his Valence Alpes International title, believes his enhanced net play is key to his recent success and aims for a top 50 world ranking.

title: BAI Implements New 3x15 Scoring System for Junior Domestic Tournaments
indian_angle: This new scoring system will directly impact young Indian badminton players in domestic ranking tournaments and national championships.
summary: Badminton Association of India (BAI) announced the implementation of a 3x15 scoring system for U-13, U-15, and U-17 categories in domestic ranking tournaments and national championships.

title: Srikanth Finishes Runner-Up at US Open
indian_angle: Indian shuttler Kidambi Srikanth reached the final of the US Open, showcasing strong form before finishing as runner-up.
summary: Kidambi Srikanth's impressive run at the US Open concluded with a runner-up finish after a hard-fought final against Su Li Yang.

title: Rounak Chouhan Upsets World No 6 at US Open
indian_angle: Young Indian shuttler Rounak Chouhan achieved a major upset by defeating World No. 6 Chou Tien Chen at the US Open.
summary: Rounak Chouhan, a self-proclaimed Cristiano Ronaldo fan, stunned the badminton world by beating the sixth-ranked player, Chou Tien Chen, at the US Open Super 300.

title: BAI Releases Addendum for Junior Asia Championships Selection
indian_angle: The Badminton Association of India issued further addendum to the selection criteria for the upcoming Badminton Asia U17 & U15 Junior Championships 2026, guiding aspiring Indian juniors.
summary: The Badminton Association of India has released an addendum to the selection criteria for the 2026 Badminton Asia U17 & U15 Junior Championships, providing updated guidelines for junior players.

title: BAI Warns Against Unauthorized Badminton Events
indian_angle: BAI has issued an advisory to players and officials regarding participation in unauthorized badminton leagues and tournaments, emphasizing official sanctioning.
summary: The Badminton Association of India (BAI) has released an advisory warning players, coaches, and officials against participating in unsanctioned badminton leagues and tournaments.
